docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT BEVANS, APRIL HEARING SET FOR MAY-14-2025 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON MAY-14-2025 IN DEPT. 206 - HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT APRIL BEVANS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
